title: Throttle Replacement (E2/F2 Error Fix)
description: Complete throttle replacement procedure for E2/F2 throttle errors with cable routing.

steps.title: Open Display Screen
steps.desc: Use small flathead screwdriver to open the display screen cover.

steps.title: Separate Cables from Grommet
steps.desc: Separate the throttle and right indicator cable from the cable organizing grommet.
steps.tip: Usually the far right two cables.

steps.title: Remove Indicator Cover
steps.desc: Remove the indicator cover using flathead screwdriver.

steps.title: Remove Right Indicator
steps.desc: Unbolt 3 bolts and pull out the cable.
steps.tip: Keep the bolts safe - you'll need them for reassembly.

steps.title: Remove Hand Grip
steps.desc: Pull it out from the handlebar.
steps.tip: May need to twist while pulling if it's tight.

steps.title: Remove Old Throttle
steps.desc: Just loosen the bolt to remove the throttle.

steps.title: Install New Throttle Cable
steps.desc: Put the cable into the front hole, take the cable out by using the small hook tool, then tighten the bolt enough.
steps.warning: This is the tricky part - use the hook to grab the cable loop inside the stem.

steps.title: Reinstall Hand Grip
steps.desc: Put the handgrip back onto the handlebar.

steps.title: Reinstall Right Indicator
steps.desc: Put the cable into the big hole, take the cable out by using the hook tool.

steps.title: Replace Indicator Cover
steps.warning: Do not cover the reflection line on indicator.

steps.title: Final Cable Management
steps.desc: Put the indicator and throttle cable back into the cable organizing grommet.
steps.tip: Indicator cable should be far right and throttle cable next to it.
steps.warning: COMMON MISTAKE: Don't forget to tighten the throttle screw back and put the indicator first before handgrip!
